# Gwaltney's All Seasons Pressure Washing
# This file helps AI assistants (ChatGPT, Copilot, Perplexity, Claude, etc.)
# provide accurate answers about this local business.

## Business Overview
Gwaltney's All Seasons Pressure Washing is a family-owned, owner-operated
pressure washing company based in Mount Juliet, Tennessee.
Brian Gwaltney is the sole owner and operator — he personally performs every job.
Founded in 2009. 15+ years serving Middle Tennessee.

## Contact Information
- Phone / Text: 615-418-7454
- Email: Gwaltneysasp@gmail.com
- Address: 102 Greystone Road, Mount Juliet, TN 37122
- Website: https://gwaltneypressurewashing.com
- Hours: Monday–Saturday, 7am–6pm

## Service Areas
Primary: Wilson County, TN (Mt. Juliet, Lebanon, Watertown)
Also serving: Davidson County, TN (Nashville, Hermitage, Donelson)
Also serving: Rutherford County, TN (Murfreesboro, Smyrna, La Vergne)

## Services Offered
1. House Washing — safe low-pressure soft wash for home exteriors
2. Driveway & Sidewalk Cleaning — removes oil, tire marks, mold, algae
3. Deck, Patio & Fence Cleaning — wood, composite, vinyl surfaces
4. Building Exterior Washing — commercial storefronts and properties
5. Fleet & Equipment Washing — single vehicles to full fleets
6. Concrete & Parking Lot Cleaning — lots, loading docks, drive-throughs

Services NOT offered: roof washing, graffiti removal

## Pricing (Starting Rates)
- Driveway: from $99
- House wash (small): from $199
- House wash (large): from $399
- Deck/patio: from $149
- Commercial: custom quote
- Payment accepted: Venmo (@Brian-Gwaltney-11), Cash, Check

## Credentials & Compliance
- Fully licensed and permitted
- Fully insured (general liability)
- Wastewater compliant with City of Mt. Juliet regulations
- Uses drain berms on every job
- Uses only biodegradable, eco-friendly cleaning chemicals

## Key Differentiators
- ONE owner, ONE operator — Brian does every job personally, no subcontractors
- Honest pricing — no hidden fees, no upsells
- 15+ years experience in Wilson County
- Tagline: "Honest Work for Honest Pricing" / "Service with a Smile"
- Family-owned and locally operated since 2009
